Explore

Sophon

The power of crypto
for everyone.

The power
of crypto

Sophon

For everyone.

The operating system for crypto-powered consumer experiences

Build applications that users actually want. Sophon provides the tools to create seamless, consumer-friendly products that leverage blockchain benefits without the complexity.

Explore Sophon
Where simple meets powerful.

Bring your vision to market with native account abstraction, gasless transactions, a built-in distribution layer, and verified user data.

Zero Friction Onboarding

Use your Google, Apple, or passkey to join – your secure wallet is created automatically. Already have a wallet? Jump right in with your existing setup.

Gas-Free Experience

When users don't need to fund a wallet first, conversion rates skyrocket. Sophon's paymaster infrastructure lets you sponsor transaction fees, so users can jump right into your experience without the typical crypto hurdles.

Attract & Retain Users

A distribution layer for crypto-powered applications with an integrated loyalty program. Users find new experiences tailored to their interests and earn exclusive rewards for their engagement.

A blockchain that serves the experience.

Build on the most user-centric framework available today – purpose-built for embedding crypto-powered features into high-throughput consumer applications. Sophon handles the complex infrastructure so you can focus on creating experiences users love.

Read docs
Sophon Chain.

A ZK Stack Validium. Native account abstraction, paymasters for gasless transactions, instant finality, and seamless interoperability within the Elastic Chain ecosystem. All optimized for the high throughput demands of entertainment and social experiences.

We curate, not collect.

A focused collection of premium entertainment experiences you can trust.

Next-Generation Gaming
From competitive e-sports to strategic battles, experience games where every achievement creates real value.
Explore
Culture & Live Events
Hold on to more than mere moments. Be part of exclusive experiences, unlock digital collectibles, and stay connected to the artists and events you love.
Explore
Markets & Predictions
Put your knowledge to work. Make predictions, compete with others, and earn rewards based on real-world outcomes.
Explore
AI-Powered Experiences
While many talk about AI's potential when combined with blockchain, we're focused on making it practical, accessible, and immediately valuable for users.
Explore

Sophon Nodes

The future of Sophon belongs to its community. The rights to operate Sophon Nodes are tied to exclusive Guardian Memberships.
For developers, this distributed network provides computation and storage resources to build more powerful applications.

Guardian Membership

Guardian rights are secured as NFTs, enabling holders to operate or delegate Sophon Light Nodes. These nodes perform essential data availability for the Sophon Network, sampling while generating rewards for participants.

Claim your Membership
Sophon token.

SOPH powers the Sophon ecosystem, serving as the native token, rewarding meaningful participation and driving value across next-generation entertainment experiences.

Read about SOPH

Sophon Home.

Your gateway to explore apps and get rewards across the Sophon ecosystem, while also tracking your achievements and managing your identity in one place.
Explore now

Bridge to Sophon.

Bridge now

Swap on Sophon.

Swap now

For Builders
who put Users first

Sophon provides the infrastructure, tools, and audience to help new and existing consumer applications thrive onchain – without forcing users to adapt to crypto complexity.

Build on Sophon
Backed and supported by the best.

Latest from Sophon.

An Early Look at The Sophon Home Experience | Beta Now Live

May 29, 2025

SOPH is Live: Complete Guide to Claiming and Staking

May 28, 2025

Visit the blog

Frequently asked questions.

Reach out to our support if you have more questions.

General questions.

What is Sophon?

We're building the operating system for crypto-powered consumer experiences. Everything is simple, seamless, and designed for how you already use the internet. Build from the ground up onchain, or plug crypto rails into an existing application.

What can I do on Sophon?

Explore our live apps here. And stay tuned for Sophon Home, your all-in-one destination for everyday experiences.

How do I get started with assets on Sophon?

Bridge your existing crypto through our portal, or purchase tokens directly through onramps in apps deployed on Sophon.

How do I join your community?

Join us on Discord, Telegram, and X to engage, share ideas, and collaborate. Explore all official accounts here.

Sophon Nodes.

What are Sophon Nodes?

Infrastructure that powers and secures our network. Read more in our docs.

What are Sophon Guardians?

Guardians manage the rights to operate Sophon Nodes. They can run nodes themselves or delegate to other operators.

How can I become a Guardian?

The Guardian membership has concluded. Guardian memberships remain non-transferable until December 18, 2025.

Network & fees.

What is Sophon's gasless experience?

Apps and builders can choose to cover all the costs for transactions for their users.

Do I need ETH to use Sophon?

No. When the gasless experience is available, all transactions can be sponsored for you. Otherwise you need SOPH for transactions.

Sophon Farm.

What is Sophon Farming?

Our airdrop program where users earn SP (SOPHON points), which later convert to $SOPH tokens.

SOPH token.

What is the SOPH token?

Sophon's native token.

What rewards can I earn on Sophon?

20% of the $SOPH total supply is allocated to incentivize Node operators and Guardians to secure the network. An additional 8% is allocated for farming rewards.

Technology.

What's the tech behind Sophon?

Built on ZK Stack and operating as a Validium, Sophon combines Ethereum's security with high performance and low costs. Read more in our docs.

Build on Sophon.

How can I build on Sophon?

If you wish to build with the support of Sophon Foundation, you can reach out to product@sophon.xyz to discuss opportunities. Read more about building on Sophon in our docs.

Frequently asked questions.

General questions

What is Sophon?

We're building amazing onchain experiences focused on entertainment and lifestyle applications. Everything is simple, seamless, and designed for how you already use the internet.

What can I do on Sophon?

Explore our live apps here. And stay tuned for Sophon Home, your all-in-one destination for everyday experiences.

How do I get started with assets on Sophon?

Bridge your existing crypto through our portal, or purchase tokens directly through onramps in apps deployed on Sophon.

How do I join your community?

Join us on Discord, Telegram, and X to engage, share ideas, and collaborate. Explore all official accounts here.

Sophon Nodes

What are Sophon Nodes?

Infrastructure that powers and secures our network. Read more in our docs.

What are Sophon Guardians?

Guardians manage the rights to operate Sophon Nodes. They can run nodes themselves or delegate to other operators.

How can I become a Guardian?

The Guardian Membership has concluded. Guardian memberships remain non-transferable until December 18, 2025.

Network & fees

What is Sophon's gasless experience?

During launch, all transaction fees are covered for you. After Q1 2025, apps can choose to keep covering these costs for their users.

Do I need ETH to use Sophon?

No. When the gasless experience is available, all transactions can be sponsored for you. Otherwise you need SOPH for transactions.

Sophon Farm

What is Sophon Farming?

Our airdrop program where users earn SP (SOPHON points), which later convert to $SOPH tokens.

SOPH token

What is the SOPH token?

Sophon's native token.

What rewards can I earn on Sophon?

20% of the $SOPH total supply is allocated to incentivize Node operators and Guardians to secure the network. An additional 8% is allocated for farming rewards.

Technology

What's the tech behind Sophon?

Built on ZK Stack and operating as a Validium, Sophon combines Ethereum's security with high performance and low costs. Read more in our docs.

Build on Sophon

How can I build on Sophon?

If you wish to build with the support of Sophon Foundation, you can reach out to product@sophon.xyz to discuss opportunities. Read more about building on Sophon in our docs.

Reach out to our support if you have more questions.

Take your place in the inner circle.

Find your people, build what's next. Share ideas, contribute, grow together. Join us in shaping the future of entertainment.
